programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A man, appearing to be nothing more than a wealthy surfer, allegedly commits murder and robs an armored car, leading the FBI on a chase spanning multiple states.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A man purchases items such as real estate, boats, and vintage aircraft after stealing over $50 million from a trust fund.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A man convinces people that he is a movie producer and money management professional while collecting millions to promote his own image.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: When the FTC fines Infomercial kingpin Kevin Trudeau $37.6 million for all of his get-rich-quick schemes, he claims he's flat broke; Remington Financial Group's "advance fee" scam has cost small business owners their dreams and millions of dollars.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A promoter steals musical artists' money and dreams; an ex-IRS agent is caught in a $13 million accounting fraud and uses taxpayer money plotting to murder those who know too much.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A counterfeit wine dealer dominates the fine wine scene, making millions selling his cheap basement blends through elite auction houses.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Chris Epps charms his way up the ladder, from prison guard to the top post of Mississippi Department of Corrections Commissioner. Once in office, he and his businessman buddy, Cecil McCrory set up shop, siphoning kickbacks and bribes.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: In sun-drenched San Diego, entrepreneur and real estate developer Gina Champion-Cain lures in investors with a glamorous, beachy image and promises of sky-high returns on short-term liquor license loans.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Zachary Horwitz has dreams of making it big in Hollywood; while his onscreen career never quite flourishes, Horwitz acts his way into raising more than $600 million for an investment opportunity that is completely bogus.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed Racer, a young and upcoming driver, drives a white-body super racing car named Mach 5. Speed enters his first race to win money for his family, against his father, Pops Racer.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed enters the Sword Mountain Race behind his father's back. However, Ace and his gang attack the Mach 5, aiming to steal the blueprints of Pops Racer's new engine.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: A masked racer, whose identity is in mystery, and whose face is concealed by a mask, came to Japan. He was a top racer but was also rumored to cause car crashes whenever he races.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed was saved by a masked racer who is revealed to be Speed’s older brother, Rex Racer. When Speed was at Rex’s house, he was mistaken for Rex and kidnapped by an intruder.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed tries to help a kind old man to find his stolen car. It turns out that the man is a son of a once infamous gang boss, and the classic car he drives has a map to a stash of treasure.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed and the old man are captured by Blaggard, the boss of a gang. Speed fights back against the thugs and discovers where the treasure is hidden and offers Blaggard a deal.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Inspector Detector suspects that the criminals are mixed up in the No Limit World Race. It turns out the criminals are participating in the race in a Mammoth Car.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed and Trixie learn that the Mammoth Car is the gold smugglers, but they fall into a trap. They are saved by a masked racer and pursue the Mammoth Car as it attempts to escape.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: After being challenged by Snake, Speed decides to race against him at the upcoming Great Alpine Race. Will Speed able to beat Snake who is a member of the dangerous racing team 'Car Acrobatic Team'?

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed fell to the bottom of the valley during the race. However, Sparkle and his team managed to escape the crisis. Speed heads for Hell Valley, the most difficult point of the race.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Trixie and her friends come to the rescue when they hear about Speed’s accident in the Hell Valley. Racer X tries to guide Speed, who tries to continue the race despite of an eye injury.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: A piece of paper with X3 written on it is left at the car murder scene. It turns out that there's a son of a car racer who seeks revenge behind the murderous streak.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: A revenge plot is being hatched by a brother and sister who are the orphans of a racer killed 15 years ago in what was faked to look like an accident during a race.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed boards a plane to participate in a race across the desert. However, a bomb is planted on the plane and destroys a racer’s car. Speed tries to clear his name.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and Paul Martin explore antique shops in the West Country. At auction an expensive biscuit tin leaves a foul taste while a cheap oil painting makes an impression.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques expert chums, Raj Bisram and Paul Martin take their open-topped motor to Dorset, Devon, Somerset and beyond. Will they make profits at the Worcestershire auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and Paul Martin reach Shakespeare country, to buy or not to buy? Plus, they meet alpacas and do some ballet. Expect Incas, tutus and tights.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A new Road Trip sees Steven Moore find some pricey porcelain in an antique shop loo, while Natasha Raskin Sharp disappears down a secret tunnel on a journey back in time.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Northumberland sees Natasha on safari tracking ancient creatures while Steven finds an old elephant. Both experts go Georgian with their treasures going under the gavel in Dundee.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Steven and Natasha visit the Scottish Borders. They reveal the hidden past of the Roman Empire and an antique hiding a secret. Expect more surprises at the Edinburgh auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The Scottish antique buying adventure continues for Steven and Natasha. The pricey purchase of some militaria proves costly, and an unassuming lantern attracts big bids.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A trip through Scotland sees Natasha get to grips with haggis and Steven falls for an exquisite French lady. It's the last auction of this adventure, who will take Road Trip crown?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A new adventure for Izzie Balmer and Philip Serrell, who scour the shops of Kent in search of antiques. Expect rocking horse riding, cat whispering and disagreements about scarves.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Back on the road with Izzie Balmer and Phil Serrell as they hunt for elusive antique treasures. A gamble on some brown furniture may prove profitable at the Hertfordshire auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer and Phil Serrell are driving through a downpour in Oxfordshire on the trail of treasures. Will a long-lost saucer or designer brooch most excite the Harrogate auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Gloves off and weapons at the ready as experts Izzie Balmer and Philip Serrell scour the shops of Staffordshire and Shropshire. But who will be left standing at the auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final face-off for Izzie Balmer and Phil Serrell as they search the shops of Lincolnshire for bargains. A hefty horticultural item and delicate posy holder go to auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Wales, Izzie Balmer and Tim Medhurst search for antiques to sell at auction. Izzie gets in a spin about a chair while Tim's inner child comes alive when he finds three toy cars.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team survey antiques and heirlooms in Bristol.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team survey antiques and heirlooms at Coventry Cathedral.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team take a trip to Banqueting House, in the heart of London.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team unearth more treasures at London's Banqueting House.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team are at Highcliffe Castle in Dorset.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Featuring the story of a watercolor purchased for two cigarettes in a WWII POW camp.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team visit East Kirkby airfield in Lincolnshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team pay a second visit to East Kirkby Airfield in Lincolnshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team head to Exmouth on the Devon coast.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow spreads out its picnic rug in the beautiful gardens of Powis castle in Wales.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team make some surprising finds at Rochester Cathedral.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team returns to Rochester Cathedral, including a toast with Napoleon's drinking glass.

programme.title: Expedition Wolf
programme.desc: The team discovers how successfully the wolves are breeding and where they are heading.

programme.title: Mountain Gorilla
programme.desc: Little Imoja is the sole responsibility of her father after being abandoned by her mother; a gorilla gets caught by a poacher; scientists hope to conserve the remaining families.

programme.title: Mountain Gorilla
programme.desc: Marembo and Rukina battle for control of their group; a 10-month old gorilla is caught in a potentially fatal encounter.

programme.title: Mountain Gorilla
programme.desc: Titus loses his crown to his son, Rano; Rano faces a challenge from a more powerful group.

programme.title: Nature's Epic Journeys
programme.desc: A team of scientists follow elephants in northern Kenya, as they cope with daily challenges.

programme.title: Nature's Epic Journeys
programme.desc: 100,000 caribou face starving bears and wolves, deadly frozen rivers and rugged mountains, as they undertake the world's longest land migration - 5,000 miles through the frozen Arctic wilderness of Canada and Alaska.

programme.title: Nature's Epic Journeys
programme.desc: Thousands of zebra face lions, hunting dogs, drought and starvation as they undertake the world's most newly discovered migration. Braving one of Botswana's most brutal wildernesses they make Africa's longest land migration.

programme.title: Ocean Giants
programme.desc: Exploring the intimate details of the great whales; from the balmy waters of the Indian Ocean to the freezing seas of the Arctic, two daring underwater cameramen come face-to-face with fighting humpback whales and a 200-ton feeding blue whale.

programme.title: Ocean Giants
programme.desc: The large brains of whales and dolphins enable them to learn new behaviors quickly and use a wide range of sounds to communicate with others; Professor Denise Herzing studies the dolphin mind in the hopes of communicating with them.

programme.title: Ocean Giants
programme.desc: The sperm whale creates clicks to hunt giant squid; narwhals use sound to locate vital breathing holes in ice floes; the boto dolphin's ultrasonic calls help it find fish in murky waters; killer whales use wolf-like howls to round up herring shoals.

programme.title: Operation Snow Tiger
programme.desc: Liz Bonnin helps scientists study Siberian tigers and rescue orphaned cubs.

programme.title: Operation Snow Tiger
programme.desc: Liz Bonnin searches for breeding Siberian tigers in the Russian Far East.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: Nigel shows that spicy food isn't all about hot chilis, but a range of everyday spices.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: How to make simple, delicious feasts from ingredients that seem to have seen better days.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: Nigel creates a week's worth of meals from ingredients that are sometimes overlooked.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: Nigel creates a week's worth of meals from often overlooked ingredients.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: Nigel shows that adventurous doesn't have to mean complicated.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: With a little planning, all the stress can be taken out of cooking; Nigel inspires with a range of dishes that can be easily adapted throughout the week.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Easy Meals
programme.desc: Rachel creates the taste of summer and meets Ireland's only buffalo mozzarella producer and the ladies of the Irish Countrywoman's Association.

programme.title: Rachel Allen's Easy Meals
programme.desc: Delicious suggestions for the perfect romantic dinner, including spicy squid salad.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc creates four mouth-watering chocolate recipes: a simple mousse, rich chocolate delice, fondant with a melting middle, and his signature dessert: cafe creme, which is a chocolate-sculpted cup filled with a mousse and coffee sabayon.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Raymond dives into the world of fish with the underused and affordable mackerel; he creates a light meal of grilled mackerel with a soy lime dressing.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc looks to the UK's favorite fruit, apples, for inspiration; he returns to memories of childhood with a simple tart made with a foolproof pastry and custard filling.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc celebrates the season with a winter vegetable salad featuring beetroots, a celeriac puree served with a crisp-skinned roast wild duck with blackberry sauce and watercress soup.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc uses two seasonal ingredients, game and mushrooms, to create a French version of a pasty called pithivier, which is filled with a rich mix of pheasant, chestnuts and dried fruits; he also makes a cep mushroom tortellini with fresh pasta.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: The miracle of yeast helps Raymond to create a French classic: brioche; he gets down to basics with a French country bread recipe that's essential for any baker to add to their repertoire; lastly, he makes a spectacular apple croustade.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc combines the universally popular ingredients of egg and cheese to make a classic omelette with a secret technique; he then uses a Comte from his home region in France to make a family-style souffle.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc focuses on tomatoes, opening with a simple salad recipe inspired by his mother; he also makes a creamy risotto, stuffed tomatoes glazed with cheese and a series of ices and sorbets to cleanse the palate with elegance.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc celebrates the best of British shellfish as he cooks dishes including Moules Mariniere, seared squid salad and Scottish lobster.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond begins with a feather-light lemon tea cake, coated in an apricot jam and tangy lemon glaze; he also makes a choux pastry filled with chocolate cream and covered with a chocolate icing; lastly, the secrets to the perfect macarons.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc shares his favorite lamb dishes: lamb liver with caramelized potatoes and French seasoning, a slow-roasted garlic and herb lamb shoulder with potato and turnip gratin and lamb provencal with ratatouille.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Raymond celebrates his passion for puddings, cooking dishes including riz au lait, tarte tatin and fruit crumble.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond shares his love of charcuterie, beginning with thin slices of duck cured in herbs and juniper berries; also, he makes a chicken liver parfait and a meaty pot-au-feu medley; lastly, a ham hock terrine served with home-made pickles.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Drawing upon his travels through Asia, Raymond creates dishes full of fragrant spice and fiery heat.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Raymond demonstrates the versatility of the summer's juiciest fruits with a simple but impressive berry-strewn pavlova and a spicy cherry clafloutis sees the vibrant fruit cushioned in a bed of soft, sumptuous pastry.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Raymond celebrates the freshest summer greens, beginning with a simple yet vibrant pistou soup, laden with summer vegetables and bursting with basil, topped with crispy croutons and meltingly rich parmesan.

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Exploring Windsor Castle, the world's oldest and largest inhabited castle.

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Edinburgh's Palace of Holyroodhouse is the least-known but most romantic of the royal palaces.

programme.title: Sandringham: A Royal Residence
programme.desc: Be transported back to 1862 when the building first came into royal hands; Nigel Havers reveals that it was Queen Victoria who snapped up the original Sandringham Hall as a 21st birthday present for her party-loving son Prince Bertie.

programme.title: Sandringham: A Royal Residence
programme.desc: The death of Edward VII in 1910 rocks Sandringham and the royals; the privately-owned house was inherited by Edward VII's wife, Alexandra; how the abdication crisis threw the very future of the house into question.

programme.title: Sandringham: A Royal Residence
programme.desc: A look at 1952, when tragedy struck as King George VI died in his sleep, discovering what happened as the new Queen began her reign.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: París
programme.desc: Cuando la testigo estrella del gobierno en un caso de malversación es objetivo de un asesino, depende del equipo ayudarla a llegar a casa con vida.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Farsa
programme.desc: El equipo se encuentra en una carrera contrarreloj cuando un grupo terrorista amenaza con detonar una bomba radioactiva en la zona de Washington.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Navaja
programme.desc: Cuando un marine es encontrado muerto, Gibbs, Fornell y el equipo se dirigen a la carretera para detener una operación ilegal de camiones.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Día de las madres
programme.desc: Los secretos surgen cuando la ex suegra de Gibbs aparece como testigo en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La vida real
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se enfrentan a una investigación de homicidio de hace un año que Maggie (Callie Thorne), la médium que anteriormente les ayudó a resolver un caso, trae a su atención.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La lista negra
programme.desc: Frank y Erin se encuentran en una encrucijada cuando se enteran de que la oficina del fiscal guarda una lista de policías de Nueva York que consideran «poco fiables».

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Detrás de la sonrisa
programme.desc: La estima de Frank por una vieja amiga y difunta dama de la alta sociedad resulta ser un error cuando su hijo amenaza con revelar públicamente quién era en realidad.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Otra mirada
programme.desc: Frank se toma a pecho uno de los casos de Jamie cuando se trata de la sospechosa muerte de la esposa de su amigo, el agente del FBI Wilson Ortega (Emiliano Diez), quién tenía una enfermedad terminal.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando unos cuerpos ahogados misteriosamente son descubiertos en el desierto de Las Vegas, el UAC trata de averiguar la verdadera causa y el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran tres cuerpos con marcas de mordeduras de animales y humanos en una tumba poco profunda cerca de Milwaukee, la UAC tiene preguntas desconcertantes que responder.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: A medida que el UAC concluye una investigación sobre apuñalamientos inusuales en el estado de Nueva York, la visita de Morgan a un sobreviviente podría descubrir más preguntas que quedan para que el equipo responda.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Día de las madres
programme.desc: Los secretos surgen cuando la ex suegra de Gibbs aparece como testigo en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/21/2021. Stanley Tucci heads to Rome in search of the famous Four Pastas. Stanley orders rigatoni all’amatriciana, samples carbonara and tries a selection of cheeses and sausages made from the sheep and pigs farmed in the region.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/28/2021. Stanley Tucci explores Bologna, seen by many as the food capital of Italy. The region of Emilia-Romagna is home to globally renowned protected food products: parmigiano, prosciutto de Parma and traditional balsamic vinegar to name a few.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 3/7/2021. Stanley Tucci eats and drinks his way around Milan. Here, Stanley enjoys an aperitivo, feels inspired to make pizzoccheri – a noodle made from buckwheat, and enjoys classic Milanese – veal chops and risotto.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 3/14/2021. Stanley Tucci explores his former home: Tuscany. Stanley does a wine bar crawl, celebrates the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes which use stale bread as the key ingredient.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 3/21/2021. Stanley Tucci visits Sicily. Here, Stanley tries a salty crunchy sensation, tastes the grapes grown in the region's unique soils, and reflects on Sicilian hospitality.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/14/2021. Stanley Tucci feasts on pizza in Naples. Stanley embarks on a whirlwind tour to find the freshest mozzarella and the best San Marzano tomatoes, and enjoys a spectacular spaghetti and zucchini.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/21/2021. Stanley Tucci heads to Rome in search of the famous Four Pastas. Stanley orders rigatoni all’amatriciana, samples carbonara and tries a selection of cheeses and sausages made from the sheep and pigs farmed in the region.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/22/2016. Zamir Gotta upstages Anthony Bourdain on a tour of the country situated in the Caucasus, featuring food from Tbilisi, Batumi and Khurvaleti.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/29/2016. Anthony Bourdain explores the West African nation with chef Pierre Thiam, journalist Ofeibea Quist-Arcton and famed musician Youssou N’Dour.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 6/5/2016. The famed Carnival celebration sets the tone for Anthony Bourdain’s visit to this city that boasts Kolsch, the raw minced pork dish mett and blood sausage.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 6/12/2016. Anthony Bourdain’s trip to this city renowned for its love of meat features a meal at the famed Don Carlos and an after-hours soccer match.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/20/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits the Johannesburg Suburb of Hillbrow, where he spends a day with a taxi driver while absorbing the culture and of course, food.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 3/26/2023. Mexico City is one of the world’s emerging food destinations, and it’s also Eva Longoria’s second home. Longoria takes us to some of her favorite eating spots, but in this constantly evolving city, there is always more to explore.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/2/2023. In the jungles of Yucatán State, on the eastern edge of Mexico, Longoria explores the home of the ancient Maya, where a fierce pride in that ancestry still permeates every custom and dish, even in the most innovative kitchens.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/9/2023. Travelling to the mountains of Southern Mexico, Longoria discovers the hidden magic of Oaxaca that boasts some of the finest ingredients in Mexico, including chocolate, corn, tomatoes and the much-loved quesillo cheese.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/16/2023. Eva Longoria visits the northeastern state of Nuevo Leon, bordering her home state of Texas. As little grows there, and with meat on every menu, inventive and resourceful chefs transform simple ingredients into culinary delights.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/23/2023. Eva Longoria visits the state of Jalisco, where much of what is seen is quintessentially ‘Mexican’ originated. She also discovers that the state capital, Guadalajara, boasts some of the country’s most cutting-edge restaurants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police find a burglary suspect up a tree in a California backyard, a parolee at large attempts to flee officers, and a man with a suspended license blows his second chance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to ditch his stash in a laundromat, a nervous driver arouses suspicion, and a woman returning home from a night out finds her boyfriend has changed the locks.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers split up to interrogate two men suspected of stealing a pick-up truck, a motorist tries to ditch a bag of meth, and police discover a bunch of syringes in a vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bewildered driver claims that he did not see the lights or hear the sirens when he was signaled to stop. Officers investigate a call regarding a suspicious parked car. A manager of an apartment complex is assaulted by their intoxicated tenants.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Bordertown

programme.title: Lars y una chica de verdad

programme.title: Sopa de tortilla

programme.title: El apartamento
programme.desc: ¿Y si la mujer que amabas desapareciera sin una sola palabra? ¿Hasta qué punto volverías a encontrarla? Josh Hartnett, Diane Kruger, Rose Byrne y Matthew Lillard protagonizan este intenso neonoir donde el amor se convierte en obsesivo.

programme.title: Mátame suavemente

programme.title: El sol tambíen es una estrella

programme.desc: En Atlantic City, un intento de asesinato lleva a un detective (Nicolas Cage) a investigar un caso de homicidio con 14.000 posibles sospechosos y una conspiración mortal en la que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: Yo soy la venganza
programme.desc: Un hombre inicia un camino de venganza contra varios oficiales de policía corruptos, al ser incapaz de descubrir al asesino de su mujer.

programme.title: A contrarreloj
programme.desc: En este fascinante thriller, el jefe de Policía (Denzel Washington) de una pequeña ciudad, se ve inmerso en graves problemas al investigar el asesinato de una mujer con la que mantenía una relación en secreto porque todas las pruebas apuntan a él.

programme.title: Renegados
programme.desc: Después de recibir la misión de recuperar un cofre de oro, una compañía de infantería de Black abandona su unidad después de la Guerra Española-Americana, cuando se dan cuenta de que su comandante sádico matará y reclamar el tesoro para sí mismo.

programme.title: El sustituto (1996)
programme.desc: An ex-marine goes undercover as a substitute teacher and discovers a gang is terrorizing the high school. As lives are threatened, he sets out to clean up the crime-infested school.

programme.title: El infierno

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda

programme.title: El Crimen del Padre Amaro LAS
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: El ardor
programme.desc: Gael García Bernal protagoniza a un misterioso héroe que emerge de la selva argentina para rescatar a una joven (Alice Braga) y al rancho de su familia, de brutales usurpadores de tierra.

programme.title: Baracoa

programme.title: Un padre no tan padre
programme.desc: La nueva era choca con la vieja en esta hilarante y cálida comedia familiar sobre un anciano gruñón de 85 años que se muda con su hijo y sus excéntricos compañeros de casa.

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas
programme.desc: Prepárate para una versión retorcida del cuento clásico. Convertidos en profesionales, Hansel y Gretel se enfrentan al trauma de su cautiverio infantil, asesinando brujas a sueldo.

programme.title: Del crepúsculo al amanecer
programme.desc: En este clásico de Tarantino, los bandidos hermanos Gecko ¡cometen una ola de crímenes! Secuestran a un padre y sus dos hijos, y se esconden en un bar mexicano. Pero se enfrentarán a los clientes del bar y se unirán a sus rehenes para sobrevivir.

programme.title: Del crepúsculo al amanecer 2: Texas sangriento

programme.title: Del crepúsculo al amanecer 3: la hija del verdugo
programme.desc: Al caer la noche, el escritor Ambrose Bierce y otros compañeros de viaje se reúnen en un bar en el desierto de México, en 1914. Será una experiencia difícil de olvidar, ya que el bar está dirigido por un grupo de seres sedientos de sangre.

programme.title: 666: El niño Diablo

programme.title: Viernes 13

programme.title: Viernes 13: Parte 2

programme.title: El chico de oro

programme.title: Hatari
programme.desc: Director Howard Hawks reteams with John Wayne, who heads a group of highly skilled professional game hunters in Africa. Only they don’t use bullets – they capture the ferocious big game with strong rope and cameras for zoos and circus attractions.

programme.title: The Rainmaker
programme.desc: Katharine Hepburn garnered an Oscar nomination as the "plain yet magnetically beautiful" tomboy rancher, with Burt Lancaster brilliantly cast in the role of the smooth-talking con man.

programme.desc: A timeless tale of two mismatched strangers joining forces in a common cause - and finding love along the way. The story chronicles the burgeoning romance as they reluctantly join forces to torpedo a German gunboat in war-torn East Africa.

programme.desc: Director Howard Hawks reteams with John Wayne, who heads a group of highly skilled professional game hunters in Africa. Only they don’t use bullets – they capture the ferocious big game with strong rope and cameras for zoos and circus attractions.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A collection of stolen art comes to Stalag 13 and Hogan decides to steal it back for the Allies.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a blue feather arrives in the mail for Lisa, her Hungarian roots tell her that trouble is brewing. The feather is a symbol of malfortune to come, and she suspects it was sent by Hungarian gypsies, a warning that they are out to get her.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver Wendell Douglas returns from farm to firm... law firm, that is. When a young and ambitious local graduates from law school, he looks for a potential partner in Hooterville. Oliver is the logical choice. Lisa and Eb help the new venture.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After partnering with a young, local lawyer, Oliver has opened a new law office in Hooterville. However, their secretary, Lisa, shows a lack of necessary skills. Soon, Lisa's job is on the line, even if she is married to one of the partners.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When the Young Peoples Agricultural Society holds their annual convention in Washington, D.C., local members Eb, Mr. Kimball, and Arnold the pig get ready to make the big trip. Oliver and Lisa serve as unintended chaperones.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: While Lisa and Oliver consider what to do on their unplanned trip to Washington D.C., Mr. Haney rents their house to a family of eight. Meanwhile in the nation's capital, Lisa and Eb tour the White House, and Mr. Kimball makes official trouble.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a charmingly sweet doe wanders onto the Douglas farm, an enchanted Lisa befriends the beautiful animal. Having had her heart won over, Lisa resolves to have all deer hunting banned in Hooterville, winning support however necessary.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Farmhand Eb plans to take his girlfriend to a fancy restaurant for her birthday. Only problem is he can't afford it. Oliver encourages Eb to get creative and figure out how to earn the money himself. And if Eb is anything, it's creative.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa becomes enchanted with the diary of a Lydia Plunkett. Found in an old trunk in the barn, the diary from 1898 tells Lydia's life story as a successful businesswoman. Eb and Lisa are glued to every page of the story, but Oliver isn't impressed.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney and Fred Ziffel try to persuade Oliver to invest in a new business venture. 'Looney Luke' Needlinger claim to have invented a machine that can turn hay into fresh milk. Oliver is skeptical and tries to prove the machine is a white lie.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Oliver returns home with Arnold, the citizens in town hold a large reception for Arnold. But when Oliver receives a phone call from a lawyer representing an eccentric relative of the Birnbachers, the riches go into question.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is tired of being the butt of Pinky Peterson's practical jokes and sets out to get revenge by fixing Pinky up on a date with Beverly Lasalle.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is thunderstruck when the Ethiopian foster child she's supported for 20 years comes to America and turns out to be quite different from what she expected.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Maude and Vivian go back to college for their thirty-year reunion, Vivian wants to go back in time and do it all over again -- this time without her husband Arthur.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Carol's beguiling ex-husband suddenly turns on the charm and captivates the Findlay household, Maude and Carol are astounded to discover his motives.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Virgil believes he acted in self-defense when he shoots a robbery suspect. But when the teenage girl's gun cannot be found, suspicions arise, even he begins to doubt his own actions. Chief Bill Gillespie does all he can to clear his detective.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Virgil Tibbs’s niece and Bubba Skinner's nephew, teenagers from different worlds, find common ground -- and trouble -- in Sparta. Soon the two are swept up with an ex-con recently paroled from prison, and Gillespie is none too happy about it.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter faces a difficult calving at Ed McDonald's farm. The cow is an experienced mum and Ed is an experienced farmer, so Peter senses it's a serious problem.

programme.title: Animal Attractions
programme.desc: Do you want to be eco-friendly when it comes to your pets? We'll show you how! Our Pet Vet covers the subject of pet anxiety. Did you know that all Siamese kittens are born white?

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian Norton gets an emergency call at 5 AM to a horse with colic. One of the nurses at the Skeldale Veterinary practice helps out on a local farm during the lambing season.

programme.title: Breeder of the Pack
programme.desc: When top-tier military and police units across the globe are in search for a dog that will serve and protect, they go to Baden K9.

programme.title: 2018 AKC National Obedience Championships
programme.desc: Part 4 of The AKC National Obedience Championships 2018

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian races over to the llama trekking centre in the Dales, after one of the youngsters breaks his jaw in a freak accident. A goat with a painful foot condition is brought in to Peter. A bulldog is rushed in after eating some chewing gum.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: As night falls, Matt rushes out to help a young farmer's pregnant sheep whose life is in danger. Peter treats Jean Green's trusty old rescue dog Reuben, who's couch bound with arthritis.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: In this episode, Peter gets a call to help a Mother ewe deliver her baby lambs, but there are complications when Peter finds out the two are tangled in the womb.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Gorilla doing funny gestures and postures; horse makes funny faces; duck honking horn.

programme.title: To The Rescue

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis schemes to prevent Dana from legally adopting Adam's surrogate child; Adam anonymously informs the press of drug problems on Steven's football team; Steven discovers a powerful secret in Dana's past.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sean threatens Dana with blackmail unless she helps him gather incriminating information against the Carrington family; Josh Harris is devastated by Sammy Jo's rejection of his wedding proposal; Fallon asks Jeff for a divorce.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: After meeting with Cora Van Husen, Krystle obtains a copy of the scandalous video, proving Blake's innocence; Dex discovers Sean is somehow involved with unsavory characters proposing a multi-million dollar oil venture to Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Following Josh Harris' death, Sammy Jo realizes she must let go of Steven; upset by Steven's uncompromising use of power, Fallon drifts further away from her brother; Dana gives the notes of Denver-Carrington's board meeting to Sean.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sean uses Alexis' bid for governor to gain control of Colbyco; Sammy Jo and Jeff develop a deep friendship from their mutual loneliness; Dana tells Adam he was the father of her aborted baby. As Adams turns to Karen for solace.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle discovers damaging information regarding Alexis' marriage to Cecil Colby, Leslie follows Sean to his father's grave, learning his true identity as Joseph Aynders' son; Dana returns to Adam and the two quietly forget the past.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Forced by Adam and Fallon's vote, Steven reluctantly agrees to authorize the Vitron oil deal, as Sean's maniacal scheme to avenge his father's death begins to unfold; Krystle obtains a copy of Cecil Colby's original will.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Encouraged by her popular support after the shooting, Alexis decides to stay in the race; Sean speeds up his plan to use the Vitron oil deal to crush Alexis; Karen is unnerved by the return of her ex-husband.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Tired of Leslie's threats to expose his true identity, Sean plants a poisonous snake in her room as a warning of who she is dealing with; having second thoughts about accepting Adam's bribe to stay away from Karen, Jesse gives the money back.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Karen is rushed to the hospital as she goes into labor; after Sean threatens Leslie, she confides in Dex, Sean's true identity; Dex warns Alexis that Sean may be seeking vengeance against her as she listens in horror.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis warns Blake about Sean's true identity. Concerned for his family's safety, Blake and Dex go to Natumbre to uncover Sean's mysterious scheme involving the Vitron oil deal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Following the explosion in Natumbre, Blake is accused of dealing in illegal arms; Alexis uncovers proof that Sean paid Jesse to return to Denver so he could persuade Karen to keep Adam's baby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dana tries desperately to convince Adam how much she wants their son. She proposes that if they were a loving couple again, the judge would find in their favor. Still hurting from her outburst in court, Adam is cold to her pleas.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam is absolved of suspicion in the kidnapping of his son when Leslie calls him to say that Sean has taken the baby and is holding her captive. Adam and Steven hurry to the desolate mountain cabin.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, college co-ed Jenna Verhaalen was found dead in her Bryan, Texas apartment. Petechial hemorrhages in her eyes indicated that she was strangled.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A bomb, constructed to cause as much damage as possible, kills a victim with deadly force and flame. When a painstaking search yields some tiny clues, police are able to identify the killer as surely as if he'd signed them.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, when a fundamentalist group begins robbing banks near Spokane, authorities know immediately that they are dealing with experienced criminals.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this episode, the decade-old murder of a young Texas housewife is investigated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep and toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood. Investigators find a suicide note and presume he killed himself until a forensic linguist examines the note.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body and a tiny wad of chewing gum found near the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, the body of exotic dancer Rachel Siani was found beneath a New Jersey bridge. Investigators wondered if she had committed suicide. They discovered that Rachel offered to assist a drunk customer named John "Jack" Denofa to his motel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The bodies of several women are found on a remote hill in California. The police get a break when a prostitute escapes and is able to identify her attacker and his automobile.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called about a dead body, a background check on the victim leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks — all fronted by elderly couple Ray and Faye Copeland.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was the single most deadly automobile accident in American history. Almost a hundred vehicles were involved, twelve people died and more than fifty people were injured. And it happened along a stretch of highway long known for dense, thick fog.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This examination of the role autopsies play in murder investigations focuses on the suspicious death of Virginia Ridley. Police charge her mentally unstable husband with murder, but a medical examiner discovers that she died of natural causes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an off-duty policeman was shot dead, his fellow officers were determined to solve the crime. They needed clues to find the killer and they discovered them in tiny fibres and an asthma inhaler.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The prime suspect had a criminal record and his driver's license was found at the scene of a brutal double homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: 6-year-old Nicole Rae Walker was killed in a hit-and-run in her Ft. Lauderdale neighborhood. The prosecutor combines the talents of an accident reconstruction expert with a video specialist to create a graphic demonstration of the moment of impact.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of college student Laura Salmon was found on a Middle Tennessee farm, covered with her own denim jeans as well as the jeans of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It's usually easy to determine how a criminal entered the crime scene. But in this case, it looked as if the killer vanished into thin air — and perhaps he had.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How unlucky could one man be? His college sweetheart killed herself and fourteen years later, his wife ended her life in a similar way. Investigators had to determine if this was murder or simply a bizarre coincidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sometime during a neighborhood Christmas party, five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared. Investigators turned to forensic science to help them see what the witnesses missed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After shooting his victims in the head, the killer staged the scene, placed the incriminating evidence into a plastic bag and tossed it into the river.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.desc: New Zealand's dark fjords harbor creatures normally found in the deep; as winter approaches, bottlenose dolphins must escape their freezing fjord, while in a mountain river, a longfin eel heeds the call of the sea.

programme.title: Shadowlands
programme.desc: The south-eastern coast of New Zealand is the place for young marine animals to transition from novices to independent adults; young whales, dolphins and seals learn to hunt, learn the rules of society, or strike out on their own adventures.

programme.title: Extreme Snakes
programme.desc: Discover how Australia's snakes slithered their way to the top of every ecosystem in one of the harshest and most extreme continents on earth.

programme.title: Kui Buri: Thailand's Hidden Eden
programme.desc: Visit a jungle paradise that is a model for national parks around the world.

programme.title: Hotspots
programme.desc: Climbing up into the cloud forest and peeking inside a waypoint for migrating birds.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Tide
programme.desc: Get closer to nature and deepen your understanding of our complex natural world. Filmed in the highest quality, Love Nature offers viewers powerful stories of nature's beauty and wonder from around the globe.

programme.title: Parents In The Wild
programme.desc: Exploring mantled guereza monkeys, where aunts and siblings aid parenting during daring climbs.

programme.title: Wild Korea
programme.desc: Korea is known as a modern, high-tech nation, but beyond the bustle of the cities exists a land of stunning natural beauty and remarkable wildlife including the beautiful goshawk, the bottleneck dolphin and the curious raccoon dog.

programme.title: The Canary Islands
programme.desc: Discovering the wildlife and flora that call the Canary Islands home; how life on these remote landmasses have led to some unique evolutionary traits.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia
programme.desc: Australia's native crocodiles.

programme.title: Under the Sea
programme.desc: Observe the risky, clever methods that marine families use to create new life.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The island of Rabaul has many remains of Japanese casualties of the Pacific War. It's said that Captain Cook's secret treasure is hidden there, worth 1-billion pounds. Lupin and gang are after this treasure but they get attacked!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and gang break into the Bank of Stockholm but as usual, Fujiko tries to take the money all for herself. Lupin goes after her but she gets injured in an avalanche. She confesses to Lupin about the location of her most precious treasure…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends search a month for the pirate Kid's treasure, but they are thwarted by an underground organization called the Red Ghost. Knowing something is afoot, Lupin sends Fujiko and Goemon to investigate.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin finds a piece of paper in a silk hat, an heirloom of Arsène Lupin. It's information regarding an opal statue of Venus, and since Lupin figures its ownership is his birthright, he heads to Gregoire's castle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata acquires a pie-throwing gun, and is ordered to capture Lupin. Meanwhile, Lupin and Fujiko are discussing Napoleon's treasures. It's said that the key to solving the mystery of their whereabouts lies in a scarf made by Napoleon's assistant…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The young girl Francoise lives near Lupin; she watches Lupin and Fujiko talking, and falls for him. But her father scolds her and tells her to stay away from thieves, but Francoise devises a plan to approach Lupin anyway…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Professor Pancho has devoted his life to solving the problem of food supply. Lupin decides to help them out and invents a rocket that flies on corn fuel, thinking that maybe he and Fujiko will take a trip to the moon…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is blackmailed; Fujiko has been kidnapped, and for ransom he must steal a jeweled crown worth 100 million dollars. Lupin and friends head to the museum where their objective lies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lady Black and Fujiko have a bet. Whoever kills Lupin will get the loser's entire jewelry collection. Lady Black lures Lupin using Fujiko so she could kill him, but why is she so passionate about wanting him dead?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Boss Largo wants Lupin dead; Lupin had just stolen a bundle of the boss's casino profits. But no run of the mill hitman would suffice to wack Lupin. But Largo sees that Lupin is suffering from a toothache, and gets an idea.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin reads the morning paper, which says that Lupin stole a 100-karat diamond that was being used in a musical. He knows he didn't do it, so he asks Fujiko and others, but they too have no idea what it's all about.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The nation of Janaica is troubled with coup d'etats and revolutions, but Lupin, discovering that the president's mansion houses the missing painting "Nude Venus," decides to go scope the joint with Jigen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The master of surrealism, Monsieur Daré had spent three years working on his masterpiece, but news is out that the great object of art got stolen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Three incidents of bank robbery have happened; a total of 1.3 billion yen was stolen. A man calling himself Goemon is the culprit and he even sends Lupin a challenge, but Goemon wants to settle the score by himself.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's stash of Napoleon's cash got stolen, but Lupin catches the culprit and tries to make him confess. Turns out he's only one of the followers of the Fandar cult, and heads to their holy land of Fandara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin learns that a treasure trove lies in a volcano on Cleo Island, but it can only be reached when the mountain isn't spewing molten lava! He tries to convince Jigen and Goemon to join him but they're not interested.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko informs Lupin that fine quality diamonds from South Africa are stored in a safe of a global syndicate and importer of diamonds. Lupin makes his way as a worker in the boiler room, and steals the loot of diamonds.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin finds out about the jewel "Poison Trio" of the Borges family and decides to steal it after Fujiko goads him. Galdan, the nephew of Lucricia greets Lupin, and tells him that elderly Lucricia had been arrested and must be broken out of jail.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin goes on a safe-cracking rampage and rakes in 10 million francs. He needs the money to purchase the world's only rare Gold Butterfly at an auction. But Lupin drops the 10 million francs while on the run…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin scopes a jewelry museum where the billion-dollar gem Cleopatra's Tear is displayed. But Lupin can't get to it because the display case is secured by high-voltage electricity.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: No thief has ever succeeded in stealing the secret gem of Pompeii's nunnery; it's guarded by venomous snakes. Even Arsene Lupin gave up on it, since he hates snakes. But Lupin takes on the challenge. Will Lupin succeed? And what kind of secret gem is it?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though the tycoon Steel had replaced all his bodily organs with artificial organs to live, he's told that he only has a week to live. There is only one way he could prolong his life, which is to receive a brain transplant and he wants Lupin's Brain.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Famous gourmand and field mice scientist Salmon Whitney is also known as being the chairman of a Canadian diamond mining operation. Lupin is after his diamonds, which will go on auction in Paris.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Coaxed by Fujiko, Lupin decides to steal the diamond chandelier at the Kremlin Palace. He disguises himself as Zenigata and infiltrates the palace, but government police soldier Natasha captures him and throws him in the slammer.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: England's Lord Weather provokes Lupin with a bet, and dares him to steal Red Arrow away from him. Lupin takes the challenge as it's a matter of pride, but Jigen wants no part of it because he and Weather are gambling buddies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Miami Bank is on the verge of bankruptcy after its last customers closed their accounts. The bank manager Garlic devises a plan to revive the bank, and drums up news that his bank had been raided by Lupin; he also asks Lupin to really do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Thief brothers Nanja-Monja have been in the business since the days of Arsène Lupin; they decide to induct Lupin as a tourist attraction for the Republic of Karchina. But first they abduct Fujiko.

programme.title: Pipeline: MiLB Game of the Week
programme.desc: Mets prospect Jonah Tong strikes out 13 batters in the Rumble Ponies' combined perfect game.

programme.title: Studio 42 with Bob Costas
programme.desc: Bob Costas sits down with Whitey Herzog in Studio 42 to reflect on the game of baseball.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Shohei Ohtani hits a walk-off home run to lead the Dodgers to a historic 8-0 start to the season.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Team Japan defeats Team South Korea, 5-3, to win the 2009 World Baseball Classic.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Todd Frazier hits 39 home runs to win the 2015 Home Run Derby at his home ballpark.

programme.title: MLB

programme.title: World Series Film

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Samson vs. The Vampire Women

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Brute Man

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Secret Agent Super Dragon

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K

programme.title: MST3K: Mad Monster
programme.desc: Things get hairy on the Satellite of Love thanks to the lupine antics of The Mad Monster (1942) and the second chapter of Radar Men from the Moon (1952).

programme.title: Laserblast
programme.desc: A teenager discovers a laser weapon left behind by turtle-like aliens. He uses it for petty revenge, but the weapon slowly changes his personality.

programme.title: MST3K: I Accuse My Parents
programme.desc: A young man gets mixed up with a crime syndicate and blames his inattentive parents. The 1940s-era documentary short explains the then-new techniques that enabled farmers to rush produce to market.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Hellcats
programme.desc: Joel and the 'bots attempt to puzzle out what's going on in the unintelligible biker film, The Hellcats (1968). Flashbacks from earlier episodes fill out the host segments.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Todos contra todos, Electra y Arantxa atacan a Igor, el brasileño ataca a Electra, la casa es un revuelo y encima llega visita que se pone demasiado pesada.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La situación de Talía e Igor no estaría siendo la mejor. No hablar con Arantxa la lleva a quedar expuesta porque la española toma la iniciativa y le dice sus verdades.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Kyle y Chloe de Geordie Shore llegan a Súper Shore y hacen historia al llegar a la casa de sorpresa para pasar unos días con los chicos. Los Ingleses muestran por qué son tan respetados y agarran fiesta muy duro.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Fernando está en crisis, peleado y distanciado de todos, incluso sus amigos de Acapulco Shore. Ya ha tenido cruces con Potro, Abraham, Igor, Mane y Esteban. Mientras tanto Electra y Esteban deberán trabajar juntos en el bar de la playa.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Llega una sorpresa enorme para Potro que lo pondrá en jaque y en un triángulo amoroso en el que no esperaba estar. Y el resto de la casa sigue tenso aún con la partida de Fernando.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La costa del sol se ve conmocionada por el arribo de Karime y Labrador que se integran con todo a la fiesta de los Súper Shore, mientras tanto en la casa Arantxa y Mane le tienden una trampa a Talía, la operación pez se pone en marcha.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores reunidos revivirán los mejores momentos de los primeros 10 episodios de sus segundas vacaciones en un especial confidencial. Pero cuidado que esto aún no termina, todavía faltan los últimos tres episodios de Súper Shore 2.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La primera noche de Karime y Labrador en la casa se celebra con una grandiosa fiesta en la que Cañete es víctima de Karime. Para salir de la dinámica de fiestas y chiringuitos de playa, los chicos planean irse de acampada.

programme.title: Acapulco Shock: Episodio 2
programme.desc: Acapulco Shock desmenuzará todo lo ocurrido en el episodio de la semana y al decir todo es TODO; lo que vemos en pantalla y lo que ocurre fuera de ella, particularmente en las redes sociales.

programme.title: Catfish México
programme.desc: Hace 3 años Daney hizo una audición para doblar voces en un canal de Youtube, ganó y conoció al amor de su vida; le pidió matrimonio y aceptó pero nunca ha visto su cara. Necesita ayuda urgente.

programme.title: Catfish México
programme.desc: Karla ha encontrado perfiles falsos en la red, utilizando sus fotografías, los ha reportado; algunos han desaparecido y en otros aparece bloqueada. Su mayor preocupación es: ¿qué pueden estar haciendo con esos perfiles falsos? Y, ¿quién está detrás?

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: La cruda cobra su alto precio y los solteros juegan para garantizar un lugar en una salida increíble.Las 3 parejas ganadoras de la prueba serán puestas a votación entre los que no ganaron para saber cual irá a la cabina de la verdad.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Mientras los ganadores de la competencia salen para conocer la Playa del Espejo y disfrutan de su premio en plan de romance, los demás eligen una de esas parejas para la Cabina de la Verdad. Vadhir Derbez visita la casa de los solteros.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y quiere recuperar a su antigua pareja, pero la cita cambia los planes. Una pareja termina antes sus vacaciones y Spencer se abre con Norma. Rocío hace una visita exprés a la Master Suite. Hay una ceremonia de compromiso.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When an Assistant District Attorney is murdered, Matlock is asked to switch sides and act as Special Prosecutor for the state of Georgia.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock’s investigation as the state’s Special Prosecutor uncovers a judicial conspiracy involving two judges and a corporate lawyer.

programme.title: Matlock
